ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Baseline decoding gives moderate math accuracy with small truncation and acts as the control for this ablation section.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Best GSM8K accuracy with zero truncation, indicating deterministic low-temperature decoding is strongest for arithmetic prompts.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Accuracy is lower than the best settings but truncation is eliminated, so outputs are stable but less precise.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Mid-level accuracy with residual truncation shows loop-control helps but does not fully optimize the tradeoff.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Ties top GSM8K accuracy but keeps minor truncation, making it strong but less clean than Greedy Logic.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Maintains mid-level accuracy but has the highest GSM8K truncation in this sweep, so clipping is not the preferred setting.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Near-chance GPQA accuracy with very high truncation confirms unstable long-form scientific reasoning under baseline decoding.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Accuracy improves slightly but truncation worsens to the highest level, so deterministic decoding alone is insufficient for GPQA.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Moderate GPQA improvement is offset by high truncation, reflecting partial benefit with persistent completion failures.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Truncation drops substantially but accuracy falls, showing aggressive loop suppression can reduce useful reasoning depth.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Best GPQA accuracy and lowest truncation among Phase 5 GPQA variants, giving the strongest overall tradeoff.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 5 ablates decoding-time controls on a 4-bit model without retraining to test if inference policy can recover reasoning.
ablation_result_summary: Improves over baseline truncation but underperforms the best loop-breaker setting on both quality and completion stability.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 7 ablates quantization configuration inside QLoRA SFT by comparing NF4 versus NF4 with KV-cache quantization.
ablation_result_summary: NF4 outperforms NF4+KV on GPQA at equal truncation, suggesting extra KV-cache compression hurts science reasoning quality.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 7 ablates quantization configuration inside QLoRA SFT by comparing NF4 versus NF4 with KV-cache quantization.
ablation_result_summary: Adding KV-cache quantization reduces GPQA accuracy with no truncation gain, indicating a net negative tradeoff for this task.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 7 ablates quantization configuration inside QLoRA SFT by comparing NF4 versus NF4 with KV-cache quantization.
ablation_result_summary: NF4 provides solid GSM8K accuracy with zero failures and serves as the Phase 7 math reference setting.

ablation_group_brief_description: Phase 7 ablates quantization configuration inside QLoRA SFT by comparing NF4 versus NF4 with KV-cache quantization.
ablation_result_summary: NF4+KV shows a small GSM8K gain while preserving zero failures, likely a modest effect within sample-size noise.

ablation_group_brief_description: This section compares method-level outcomes between Phase 7 QLoRA SFT and Phase 8 GRPO reinforcement tuning.
ablation_result_summary: Phase 7 GPQA remains low with residual truncation and therefore motivates reinforcement-based refinement.

ablation_group_brief_description: This section compares method-level outcomes between Phase 7 QLoRA SFT and Phase 8 GRPO reinforcement tuning.
ablation_result_summary: Phase 7 GSM8K is moderate and stable, forming the pre-GRPO reference point.

ablation_group_brief_description: This section compares method-level outcomes between Phase 7 QLoRA SFT and Phase 8 GRPO reinforcement tuning.
ablation_result_summary: Phase 8 GRPO improves GPQA accuracy and removes truncation versus Phase 7, indicating better concise scientific responses derived from RL loss.

ablation_group_brief_description: This section compares method-level outcomes between Phase 7 QLoRA SFT and Phase 8 GRPO reinforcement tuning.
ablation_result_summary: Phase 8 GRPO lowers GSM8K accuracy despite zero truncation, so the pilot RL setup appears to trade math quality for behavior control.
